news.title: Ørsted Advances Flagship Offshore Wind Projects With Earnings And Risk In Focus
news.summary: Ørsted (CPSE:ORSTED) has started installing foundations at the Baltica 2 offshore wind project in Poland. The company has also commissioned the first monopile foundation at Hornsea 3 in the UK, which is set to be the largest offshore wind farm in the world.
